calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Vacated

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marc Guedenet, Esq. 650-503-1507 of Andrew & Guedenet for Defendant through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MARC GUEDENET, ANDREW WATTERS, WATTERS & GUEDENET'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL is granted.

Counsel to submit a proposed order on the judicial council form. Counsel to check the appropriate boxes and must inform Devicify that it cannot represent itself. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
